title: GitHub - rishabhcli/QAgent: Local-first self-healing QA for web apps: Electron desktop, CLI, and MCP with isolated Git worktrees, SQLite evidence, and policy-aware GitHub repair.
excerpt: Local-first self-healing QA for web apps: Electron desktop, CLI, and MCP with isolated Git worktrees, SQLite evidence, and policy-aware GitHub repair. - rishabhcli/QAgent
content_html:
QAgent is a local-first QA repair agent for individual web developers. It runs grounded checks in an isolated Git worktree, captures evidence, asks a configured model to diagnose and patch a failure, verifies the change, and can publish the verified branch through GitHub policy.

The same durable engine powers a cross-platform Electron desktop app, a CLI, and an MCP server. Runs, events, artifacts, and provider provenance live in local SQLite and survive restarts. Cloud services are adapters, not prerequisites.

v0.2 is a breaking beta. The v0.1.0 tag remains in Git history, but the old operational Next.js APIs, Expo client, Marimo dashboard, and Redis runtime are intentionally not compatible.

What Defines QAgent

  • Grounded: Every displayed result has a source, observation time, and availability state. QAgent does not generate random metrics, fake GitHub activity, silent model fallbacks, or ambiguous zeros.
  • Local-first: SQLite, artifacts, Git worktrees, and Chrome/Chromium are local by default. Only one configured model provider is needed to repair a failure.
  • Checkout-safe: A mutation run uses a new qagent/<run>-<slug> worktree and never modifies the developer's active checkout.
  • Policy-aware: Dirty checkouts block publication. Authentication, workflow, dependency, lockfile, migration, secret-policy, and .qagent.yml changes cannot auto-merge.
  • One engine: Desktop IPC, CLI, and MCP consume the same @qagent/contracts schemas and QAgentEngine; there is no parallel HTTP domain model.
  • Open: QAgent is licensed under AGPL-3.0 and is designed to be useful without a QAgent cloud.

Quickstart From Source

Requirements: Node 24, pnpm 11.15.1, Git, a Chrome-compatible browser, and one supported model.

corepack enable
corepack prepare pnpm@11.15.1 --activate
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm qagent doctor
pnpm dev

The desktop first-run flow guides you through repository selection, workspace trust, command detection, browser verification, model connection, GitHub autonomy, optional Weave disclosure, and a final Doctor check.

For the CLI:

pnpm qagent init /absolute/path/to/project
pnpm qagent project add /absolute/path/to/project --trust
pnpm qagent run start <project-id>
pnpm qagent run show <run-id>

Use --json for stable JSON output. A live run start --json emits NDJSON events followed by the terminal result. Run pnpm qagent --help for all commands and exit-code meanings.

Project Configuration

QAgent detects Node, Python, Ruby, Go, Java, and .NET projects, but repository commands are never executed until the canonical workspace path is trusted. Commit a .qagent.yml when detection is ambiguous or when you need explicit behavior:

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://rishabhcli.github.io/QAgent/schema/v1.json
version: 1
test:
  commands:
    - executable: pnpm
      args: [test]
model:
  provider: openai
  model: gpt-5-mini
publish:
  provider: local

Commands are executable/argument arrays rather than shell strings. The published JSON Schema is generated from the same Zod contract used by desktop, CLI, MCP, and the engine.

Architecture

Sandboxed React renderer ── validated IPC ── Electron main / safeStorage
                                                │
                                                ▼
CLI ─────────────┐                       UtilityProcess
MCP over stdio ──┼── @qagent/contracts ── QAgentEngine
Desktop IPC ─────┘                              │
                         ┌──────────────────────┼──────────────────────┐
                         ▼                      ▼                      ▼
                    SQLite WAL            Git worktrees         local artifacts
                         │                      │                      │
                         └──── model/browser/GitHub/Weave adapters ───┘

The durable state machine is:

preflight -> discover -> test -> triage -> patch -> verify -> publish
          -> wait_checks -> merge -> postverify -> learn -> complete

failed, cancelled, and policy_blocked are explicit terminal outcomes. Run events use UUIDs, monotonic sequence numbers, schema versions, timestamps, provenance, typed payloads, and artifact references.

See Architecture, Threat Model, and the static documentation source for details.

Repository Layout

apps/desktop/             Electron Forge + Vite + React desktop application
apps/docs/                Next.js static documentation for GitHub Pages
packages/contracts/       Shared Zod schemas and public interface types
packages/core/            Durable state machine and QAgentEngine
packages/storage/         SQLite migrations, records, leases, and artifacts
packages/adapters/        Git, browser, model, GitHub, Redis import, and Weave boundaries
packages/cli/             Human and JSON/NDJSON command-line interface
packages/mcp/             Trusted-project MCP server over stdio
fixtures/sample-web-app/  Deterministic real repair fixture
tests/                    Unit, integration, contract, desktop, and accessibility tests

Supported Adapters

Capability Default v0.2 status
SQLite Local Required, end-to-end
Chrome, Edge, Chromium Local Required, end-to-end
OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Optional cloud Built in
OpenAI-compatible / Ollama Optional local or cloud Built in
GitHub publication Optional Only certified publisher
Browserbase Optional Available adapter
Weave Optional, explicit opt-in Redacted tracing adapter
Redis Migration only qagent migrate redis
Vercel, Daytona Optional Not certified in v0.2

No credential means fully local operation except for the chosen model endpoint. An unavailable provider fails visibly; runtime code never substitutes a deterministic or fake model.

Development

pnpm schema
pnpm format:check
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test:coverage
pnpm build
pnpm package

The deterministic fixture intentionally starts broken. Tests copy it into a temporary Git repository, run the actual engine with a test-only model double, verify the patch in a worktree, and compare CLI, MCP, and desktop contracts.

Release gates reject formatting drift, ESLint warnings in first-party code, TypeScript errors, failed tests or packaging, committed secrets, CodeQL findings, and unaccepted critical/high production advisories.

Privacy And Security

Repository source, raw screenshots, DOM evidence, logs, patches, and credentials stay local by default. Weave tracing activates only after credentials and explicit disclosure acceptance; local redaction strips tokens, authorization headers, environment values, and secret-like content before delivery. Weave failure never blocks a run.

See Security Policy, Data Policy, and Threat Model.

Contributing

Read CONTRIBUTING.md and GOVERNANCE.md. By contributing, you agree that your work is licensed under AGPL-3.0.

blocks.html_en: QAgent is a local-first QA repair agent for individual web developers. It runs grounded checks in an isolated Git worktree, captures evidence, asks a configured model to diagnose and patch a failure, verifies the change, and can publish the verified branch through GitHub policy.

sentences.en: QAgent is a local-first QA repair agent for individual web developers.
sentences.zh: QAgent 是面向个人 Web 开发人员的本地优先 QA 修复代理。

sentences.en: It runs grounded checks in an isolated Git worktree, captures evidence, asks a configured model to diagnose and patch a failure, verifies the change, and can publish the verified branch through GitHub policy.
sentences.zh: 它在隔离的 Git 工作树中运行基础检查，捕获证据，要求配置的模型诊断和修补故障，验证更改，并可以通过 GitHub 策略发布经过验证的分支。

blocks.html_en: The same durable engine powers a cross-platform Electron desktop app, a CLI, and an MCP server. Runs, events, artifacts, and provider provenance live in local SQLite and survive restarts. Cloud services are adapters, not prerequisites.

sentences.en: The same durable engine powers a cross-platform Electron desktop app, a CLI, and an MCP server.
sentences.zh: 同样耐用的引擎为跨平台 Electron 桌面应用程序、CLI 和 MCP 服务器提供支持。

sentences.en: Runs, events, artifacts, and provider provenance live in local SQLite and survive restarts.
sentences.zh: 运行、事件、工件和提供者来源都存在于本地 SQLite 中，并且在重新启动后仍然有效。

sentences.en: Cloud services are adapters, not prerequisites.
sentences.zh: 云服务是适配器，而不是先决条件。

QAgent 的定义是什么

blocks.html_en: • Grounded: Every displayed result has a source, observation time, and availability state. QAgent does not generate random metrics, fake GitHub activity, silent model fallbacks, or ambiguous zeros.

sentences.en: Grounded: Every displayed result has a source, observation time, and availability state.
sentences.zh: 接地：每个显示的结果都有来源、观察时间和可用性状态。

sentences.en: QAgent does not generate random metrics, fake GitHub activity, silent model fallbacks, or ambiguous zeros.
sentences.zh: QAgent 不会生成随机指标、虚假 GitHub 活动、静默模型回退或不明确的零。

blocks.html_en: • Local-first: SQLite, artifacts, Git worktrees, and Chrome/Chromium are local by default. Only one configured model provider is needed to repair a failure.

sentences.en: Local-first: SQLite, artifacts, Git worktrees, and Chrome/Chromium are local by default.
sentences.zh: 本地优先：默认情况下，SQLite、工件、Git 工作树和 Chrome/Chromium 是本地的。

sentences.en: Only one configured model provider is needed to repair a failure.
sentences.zh: 只需要一个已配置的模型提供程序即可修复故障。

blocks.html_en: • Checkout-safe: A mutation run uses a new qagent/<run>-<slug> worktree and never modifies the developer's active checkout.

sentences.en: Checkout-safe: A mutation run uses a new qagent/<run>-<slug> worktree and never modifies the developer's active checkout.
sentences.zh: 签出安全：突变运行使用新的 qagent/<run>-<slug> 工作树，并且永远不会修改开发人员的主动签出。

blocks.html_en: • Policy-aware: Dirty checkouts block publication. Authentication, workflow, dependency, lockfile, migration, secret-policy, and .qagent.yml changes cannot auto-merge.

sentences.zh: 政策意识：脏检查会阻止发布。

sentences.en: Authentication, workflow, dependency, lockfile, migration, secret-policy, and .qagent.yml changes cannot auto-merge.
sentences.zh: 身份验证、工作流、依赖项、锁定文件、迁移、秘密策略和 .qagent.yml 更改无法自动合并。

blocks.html_en: • One engine: Desktop IPC, CLI, and MCP consume the same @qagent/contracts schemas and QAgentEngine; there is no parallel HTTP domain model.

sentences.en: One engine: Desktop IPC, CLI, and MCP consume the same @qagent/contracts schemas and QAgentEngine; there is no parallel HTTP domain model.
sentences.zh: 一种引擎：桌面 IPC、CLI 和 MCP 使用相同的 @qagent/contracts 架构和 QAgentEngine；没有并行的 HTTP 域模型。

blocks.html_en: • Open: QAgent is licensed under AGPL-3.0 and is designed to be useful without a QAgent cloud.

sentences.en: Open: QAgent is licensed under AGPL-3.0 and is designed to be useful without a QAgent cloud.
sentences.zh: 开放：QAgent 根据 AGPL-3.0 获得许可，旨在无需 QAgent 云即可使用。

content_html_zh:
QAgent 是面向个人 Web 开发人员的本地优先 QA 修复代理。 它在隔离的 Git 工作树中运行基础检查，捕获证据，要求配置的模型诊断和修补故障，验证更改，并可以通过 GitHub 策略发布经过验证的分支。

同样耐用的引擎为跨平台 Electron 桌面应用程序、CLI 和 MCP 服务器提供支持。 运行、事件、工件和提供者来源都存在于本地 SQLite 中，并且在重新启动后仍然有效。 云服务是适配器，而不是先决条件。

v0.2 是一个突破性的测试版。 v0.1.0 标签保留在 Git 历史记录中，但旧的可操作 Next.js API、Expo 客户端、Marimo 仪表板和 Redis 运行时故意不兼容。

QAgent 的定义是什么

  • 接地：每个显示的结果都有来源、观察时间和可用性状态。 QAgent 不会生成随机指标、虚假 GitHub 活动、静默模型回退或不明确的零。
  • 本地优先：默认情况下，SQLite、工件、Git 工作树和 Chrome/Chromium 是本地的。 只需要一个已配置的模型提供程序即可修复故障。
  • 签出安全：突变运行使用新的 qagent/<run>-<slug> 工作树，并且永远不会修改开发人员的主动签出。
  • 政策意识：脏检查会阻止发布。 身份验证、工作流、依赖项、锁定文件、迁移、秘密策略和 .qagent.yml 更改无法自动合并。
  • 一种引擎：桌面 IPC、CLI 和 MCP 使用相同的 @qagent/contracts 架构和 QAgentEngine；没有并行的 HTTP 域模型。
  • 开放：QAgent 根据 AGPL-3.0 获得许可，旨在无需 QAgent 云即可使用。

从源代码快速入门

要求：Node 24、pnpm 11.15.1、Git、Chrome 兼容的浏览器和一种受支持的型号。

corepack enable
corepack prepare pnpm@11.15.1 --activate
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm qagent doctor
pnpm dev

桌面首次运行流程将指导您完成存储库选择、工作区信任、命令检测、浏览器验证、模型连接、GitHub 自治、可选的 Weave 披露和最终 Doctor 检查。

对于 CLI：

pnpm qagent init /absolute/path/to/project
pnpm qagent project add /absolute/path/to/project --trust
pnpm qagent run start <project-id>
pnpm qagent run show <run-id>

使用 --json 获得稳定的 JSON 输出。 实时运行 start --json 发出 NDJSON 事件，后跟最终结果。 运行 pnpm qagent --help 了解所有命令和退出代码含义。

项目配置

QAgent 检测 Node、Python、Ruby、Go、Java 和 .NET 项目，但在可信规范工作空间路径之前永远不会执行存储库命令。 当检测不明确或需要显式行为时提交 .qagent.yml：

# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://rishabhcli.github.io/QAgent/schema/v1.json
version: 1
test:
  commands:
    - executable: pnpm
      args: [test]
model:
  provider: openai
  model: gpt-5-mini
publish:
  provider: local

命令是可执行文件/参数数组，而不是 shell 字符串。 发布的 JSON 模式是从桌面、CLI、MCP 和引擎使用的相同 Zod 合约生成的。

建筑学

Sandboxed React renderer ── validated IPC ── Electron main / safeStorage
                                                │
                                                ▼
CLI ─────────────┐                       UtilityProcess
MCP over stdio ──┼── @qagent/contracts ── QAgentEngine
Desktop IPC ─────┘                              │
                         ┌──────────────────────┼──────────────────────┐
                         ▼                      ▼                      ▼
                    SQLite WAL            Git worktrees         local artifacts
                         │                      │                      │
                         └──── model/browser/GitHub/Weave adapters ───┘

持久状态机是：

preflight -> discover -> test -> triage -> patch -> verify -> publish
          -> wait_checks -> merge -> postverify -> learn -> complete

失败、取消和policy_blocked是显式的最终结果。 运行事件使用 UUID、单调序列号、模式版本、时间戳、出处、类型化负载和工件引用。

有关详细信息，请参阅体系结构、威胁模型和静态文档源。

存储库布局

apps/desktop/             Electron Forge + Vite + React desktop application
apps/docs/                Next.js static documentation for GitHub Pages
packages/contracts/       Shared Zod schemas and public interface types
packages/core/            Durable state machine and QAgentEngine
packages/storage/         SQLite migrations, records, leases, and artifacts
packages/adapters/        Git, browser, model, GitHub, Redis import, and Weave boundaries
packages/cli/             Human and JSON/NDJSON command-line interface
packages/mcp/             Trusted-project MCP server over stdio
fixtures/sample-web-app/  Deterministic real repair fixture
tests/                    Unit, integration, contract, desktop, and accessibility tests

支持的适配器

能力 默认 v0.2状态
SQLite Local 必需，端到端
铬、边缘、铬 Local 必需，端到端
OpenAI、Anthropic、谷歌 可选云 内置
OpenAI 兼容/Ollama 可选本地或云端 内置
GitHub 发布 选修的 唯一经过认证的出版商
浏览器库 选修的 可用适配器
Weave 可选的、明确的选择加入 编辑后的跟踪适配器
Redis 仅迁移 qagent迁移redis
维塞尔、代托纳 选修的 v0.2 未经过认证

没有凭证意味着除所选模型端点之外的完全本地操作。 不可用的提供者明显失败；运行时代码永远不会替代确定性或虚假模型。

发展

pnpm schema
pnpm format:check
pnpm lint
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test:coverage
pnpm build
pnpm package

确定性装置故意开始损坏。 测试将其复制到临时 Git 存储库中，使用仅测试模型替身运行实际引擎，验证工作树中的补丁，并比较 CLI、MCP 和桌面合同。

发布门拒绝格式漂移、第一方代码中的 ESLint 警告、TypeScript 错误、失败的测试或打包、提交的机密、CodeQL 发现以及不可接受的关键/高生产建议。

隐私与安全

默认情况下，存储库源、原始屏幕截图、DOM 证据、日志、补丁和凭据保留在本地。 Weave 跟踪仅在凭证和明确披露接受后才会激活；本地密文在交付之前会剥离令牌、授权标头、环境值和类似秘密的内容。 编织失败永远不会阻碍运行。

请参阅安全策略、数据策略和威胁模型。

贡献

阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md 和 GOVERNANCE.md。 通过贡献，您同意您的作品获得 AGPL-3.0 的许可。
